organization.name: Provenant
organization.description: Provenant is a digital trust infrastructure provider focused on verifiable communications and secure telecommunications. The company develops open, standards-based solutions that embed cryptographic proof into calls and messages, enabling organizations to prove identity, authorization, and intent in real time. Provenant is a Qualified vLEI Issuer (QVI) within the GLEIF ecosystem and plays a leading role in initiatives such as the GSMA Open Verifiable Calling project, aiming to establish global, interoperable standards for trusted digital communications.
